subcodes.first_line: I went forth, and migrated, and was present, and returned. Guard thou thyself, lest thy deeds be rendered vain and thy hopes cut asunder. This sufficeth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خرجت و هاجرت و حضرت و رجعت ان احفظ نفسک لئلا یحبط عملک و یقطع املک هذا یکفیک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
